recommendations.overview: A seasoned assassin plays both sides in a Russian gang war and becomes the target of an unknown enemy.

recommendations.title: Warhorse One
recommendations.overview: A gunned down Navy SEAL Master Chief must guide a child to safety through a gauntlet of hostile Taliban insurgents and survive the brutal Afghanistan wilderness.

recommendations.overview: Special Forces commandos on a mission are abducted mid-operation by a mysterious spacecraft. Upon waking aboard, they find themselves prey to a relentless alien race in a fight for survival.

recommendations.overview: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most-powerful crime syndicates.
